title: BGP Route Flap Containment
body: Check neighbor state history, validate hold timers, inspect recent config drift, and damp unstable advertisements before they cascade across the WAN.

title: Congestion Buildup Response
body: Validate queue depth, confirm QoS class saturation, reroute non-critical flows if possible, and protect delay-sensitive traffic before SLA breach.

title: Tunnel Degradation Triage
body: Inspect packet loss trend, rekey failures, and underlay reachability. Fail over to the healthiest path and confirm tunnel crypto timers are stable.

title: Controller Drift Investigation
body: Compare active policy to the golden configuration, revert unintended routing preference changes, and revalidate service path intent after rollback.
